title: Building Controls
lede: Design, installation, and integration of building automation systems — from a single rooftop unit's BACnet feed up to a campus-wide controls overhaul. Open protocols, no proprietary lock-in.
metaDescription: Building automation and controls service from STR Mechanical — BACnet, LonWorks, Tridium, JCI, Siemens, Honeywell across NC, VA, and SC.
featuresHeading: Controls work that pays for itself.
featuresLead: A well-tuned controls system cuts energy spend 10-20% on day one. We design, install, and tune systems that keep delivering — not ones that drift back to defaults six months later.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M9 9h6v6H9z"/></svg>
features.title: BAS design & installation
features.body: New construction and retrofit — sequence of operations, panel layout, point lists, field wiring, head-end programming, and commissioning.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 1v6M12 17v6M4.22 4.22l4.24 4.24M15.54 15.54l4.24 4.24M1 12h6M17 12h6"/></svg>
features.title: Multi-vendor integration
features.body: Tridium Niagara, JCI Metasys, Siemens Desigo, Honeywell, Distech, Automated Logic — we speak every dialect, no vendor lock-in.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
features.title: Open protocols
features.body: BACnet IP/MSTP, Modbus TCP/RTU, LonWorks, MQTT — interoperable systems you can extend or replace without ripping it all out.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="M7 14l4-4 4 4 5-5"/></svg>
features.title: Energy & analytics
features.body: Trend reviews, fault detection diagnostics, energy benchmarking — find the buildings that are bleeding spend and fix them first.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2L3 7v6c0 5 4 9 9 11 5-2 9-6 9-11V7z"/></svg>
features.title: Cybersecurity hardening
features.body: Network segmentation, role-based access, password rotation, firmware patching — controls systems that won't end up on a CISA advisory.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12c0-4 4-7 9-7s9 3 9 7-4 7-9 7c-2 0-4-.5-5.5-1.5L3 19l1.5-3.5C3.5 14.5 3 13.3 3 12z"/></svg>
features.title: Recommissioning
features.body: Existing systems audited, sequences re-tuned, drifted setpoints corrected — recover the savings the original design promised.

whyHeading: Controls techs who think like engineers.
whyParagraphs: Most building controls contractors are great at pulling wire and great at programming, but rarely both — and almost never great at explaining what they did to your team.

Our controls group spans installation, integration, and analytics. We hand off systems your in-house facilities team can actually operate and maintain — with documentation that matches what's in the panel.
whyBullets: Factory-trained on Tridium, JCI, Siemens, Honeywell, Distech, Automated Logic
Niagara N4 AX-to-N4 migrations done painlessly
Graphics + sequence documentation delivered with every project
Hands-on training for your facility team
Remote support — we can dial into your system before sending a truck
ctaParagraph: Whether it's a single-building retrofit or a campus rollout, we can scope, design, install, and program — and stay around to keep it tuned.
